exercises.audioScript: There is a new movie in the theatre.
exercises.hindiScript: थिएटर में एक नई फिल्म है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: There is a lot of work today.
There is a new teacher today.
There are five rooms in this house.
There is a new movie in the theatre.
exercises.answer: There is a new movie in the theatre.

exercises.audioScript: There is a report due tomorrow.
exercises.hindiScript: कल एक रिपोर्ट जमा करनी है।

options: There is a dog outside the door.
There is milk in the fridge.
There are three files on my desk.
There is a report due tomorrow.
exercises.answer: There is a report due tomorrow.

exercises.audioScript: There is a chair near the window.
exercises.hindiScript: खिड़की के पास एक कुर्सी है।

options: There is a bus stop near here.

There is a chair near the window.

exercises.audioScript: There is a hospital on MG Road.

options: There is a new movie in the theatre.

There is a hospital on MG Road.

dictationPassage.text: There is a new movie in the theatre. There is a report due tomorrow. There is a chair near the window. There is a hospital on MG Road. There is a new teacher today.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: थिएटर में एक नई फिल्म है। कल एक रिपोर्ट जमा करनी है। खिड़की के पास एक कुर्सी है। MG Road पर एक अस्पताल है। आज एक नए शिक्षक हैं।
